'''haloyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwanjula|kwanjula]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwanjula|kwanjula]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| haloyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæleyeth|hæleyeth]] || [[word:hæleyej|hæleyej]] || [[word:hæleyesh|hæleyesh]] || [[word:hæleye|hæleye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:haloloyoth|haloloyoth]] || [[word:haloloyoj|haloloyoj]] || [[word:haloloyosh|haloloyosh]] || [[word:haloloyo|haloloyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:haloyoth|haloyoth]] || [[word:haloyoj|haloyoj]] || [[word:haloyosh|haloyosh]] || [[word:haloyo|haloyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:halofyoth|halofyoth]] || [[word:halofyoj|halofyoj]] || [[word:halofyosh|halofyosh]] || [[word:halofyof|halofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haloyotho|haloyotho]] || [[word:haloyojo|haloyojo]] || [[word:haloyosho|haloyosho]] || [[word:haloyoko|haloyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haloyoth|haloyoth]] || [[word:haloyoj|haloyoj]] || [[word:haloyosh|haloyosh]] || [[word:haloyo|haloyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haloyothol|haloyothol]] || [[word:haloyojol|haloyojol]] || [[word:haloyoshol|haloyoshol]] || [[word:haloyokol|haloyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haloyothotho|haloyothotho]] || [[word:haloyojojo|haloyojojo]] || [[word:haloyoshosho|haloyoshosho]] || [[word:haloyoko|haloyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haloyothon|haloyothon]] || [[word:haloyojon|haloyojon]] || [[word:haloyoshon|haloyoshon]] || [[word:haloyokon|haloyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haloyothoro|haloyothoro]] || [[word:haloyojoro|haloyojoro]] || [[word:haloyoshoro|haloyoshoro]] || [[word:haloyokoro|haloyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
